revealed_facts: Valve cover gasket seeping oil onto exhaust manifold, causing occasional burning smell after spirited driving; repair quoted at $850

review.review_text: Seller actively concealed a major front-end collision, an undisclosed engine oil leak, and interior damage, requiring inspections to uncover these issues.
revealed_facts: Moderate front-end collision in 2019 with $7,200 in repairs through insurance; airbags did not deploy but bumper, hood, and radiator support were replaced
